records.m_Talk_ENG: Playing tag while multiple tags are chasing Credere must be difficult.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Playing tag while multiple tags are chasing Credere must be difficult.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Playing tag while multiple tags are chasing Credere must be difficult.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happens if you get tagged by multiple people at the same time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happens if you get tagged by multiple people at the same time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happens if you get tagged by multiple people at the same time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's the type to survive the apocalypse, though. I wouldn't worry too much about her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's the type to survive the apocalypse, though. I wouldn't worry too much about her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's the type to survive the apocalypse, though. I wouldn't worry too much about her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a team fight, so let's focus on finding the treasure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a team fight, so let's focus on finding the treasure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a team fight, so let's focus on finding the treasure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah! Let's find it quickly and surprise Credere!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah! Let's find it quickly and surprise Credere!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah! Let's find it quickly and surprise Credere!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Right. First
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Right. First
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Right. First
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surrender and follow us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surrender and follow us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surrender and follow us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That would be convenient and cause less trouble for both of us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That would be convenient and cause less trouble for both of us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That would be convenient and cause less trouble for both of us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaah?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaah?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaaah?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stay still. This may be a non-lethal, but it'll still hurt if you get shot by it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stay still. This may be a blank, but it'll still hurt if you get shot by it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stay still. This may be a blank, but it'll still hurt if you get shot by it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! You're cheating! You can't just cut in the middle!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! You're cheating! You can't just cut in the middle!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! You're cheating! You can't just cut in the middle!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No weapons are allowed in a treasure hunt, ALT Commander!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No weapons are allowed in a treasure hunt, ALT Commander!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No weapons are allowed in a treasure hunt, ALT Commander!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. We have no intentions of hitting you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. We have no intentions of hitting you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. We have no intentions of hitting you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. If you resist, however, it will make things that much harder.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. If you resist, however, it will make things that much harder.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. If you resist, however, it will make things that much harder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I saw you in the manual. You're ALT Squad, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I saw you in the manual. You're ALT Squad, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I saw you in the manual. You're ALT Squad, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It happened earlier with Titan, but what on earth did the Vice President tell you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It happened earlier with Titan, but what on earth did the Vice President tell you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It happened earlier with Titan, but what on earth did the Vice President tell you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you wish to talk, we can talk on the way back. It is our mission to take you back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you wish to talk, we can talk on the way back. It is our mission to take you back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you wish to talk, we can talk on the way back. It is our mission to take you back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Playtime's over. You need to come back too, Chief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Playtime's over. You need to come back too, Chief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Playtime's over. You need to come back too, Chief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Noooo. I haven't found the treasure yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Noooo. I haven't found the treasure yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Noooo. I haven't found the treasure yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Chief. That's not an ordinary treasure. It's an Artifact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Chief. That's not an ordinary treasure. It's an Artifact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Chief. That's not an ordinary treasure. It's an Artifact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't know what might happen upon opening it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't know what might happen upon opening it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't know what might happen upon opening it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An Artifact...? Do you know something about this treasure?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An Artifact...? Do you know something about this treasure?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An Artifact...? Do you know something about this treasure?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not really. The Vice President did mention that it was something important.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not really. The Vice President did mention that it was something important.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not really. The Vice President did mention that it was something important.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But honestly, I'm not sure. There are a lot of suspicious things going on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But honestly, I'm not sure. There are a lot of suspicious things going on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But honestly, I'm not sure. There are a lot of suspicious things going on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can tell if something is dangerous, though!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can tell if something is dangerous, though!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can tell if something is dangerous, though!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Vice President is a liar. She never lets me play! She always interrupts me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Vice President is a liar. She never lets me play! She always interrupts me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Vice President is a liar. She never lets me play! She always interrupts me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. What are you doing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. What are you doing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. What are you doing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We were given one order. <color=#ffd34c>Stop the Sigma Pirates who are after the treasure.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: We were given one order. <color=#ffd34c>Stop the Sigma Pirates who are after the treasure.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: We were given one order. <color=#ffd34c>Stop the Sigma Pirates who are after the treasure.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's odd, but what can I do. If my boss tells me to do it, I have no choice but to do it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's odd, but what can I do. If my boss tells me to do it, I have no choice but to do it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's odd, but what can I do. If my boss tells me to do it, I have no choice but to do it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, there's also the possibility that you are tricking the chief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, there's also the possibility that you are tricking the chief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, there's also the possibility that you are tricking the chief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah. I'm the bad girl. Always.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah. I'm the bad girl. Always.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah. I'm the bad girl. Always.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chief, how are you with running?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chief, how are you with running?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chief, how are you with running?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm. I'm the top dog in the company when it comes to running.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm. I'm the top dog in the company when it comes to running.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm. I'm the top dog in the company when it comes to running.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just thought we could race to see who's faster.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just thought we could race to see who's faster.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just thought we could race to see who's faster.

records.m_Talk_ENG: See that corner over there? I'll give you a signal, and we both run toward it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: See that corner over there? I'll give you a signal, and we both run toward it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: See that corner over there? I'll give you a signal, and we both run toward it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One, two...
records.m_Talk_DEU: One, two...
records.m_Talk_FRA: One, two...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh. It's cheating to start before the signal, Yuppie!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh. It's cheating to start before the signal, Yuppie!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh. It's cheating to start before the signal, Yuppie!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it. My eardrums hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it. My eardrums hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it. My eardrums hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I didn't think they'd really fight back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I didn't think they'd really fight back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I didn't think they'd really fight back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not easy dealing with children.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not easy dealing with children.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not easy dealing with children.
